summary: Iteration 12: Complete SEO Studio validation. All 34 backend tests passed. Admin back-office /admin/pages/new and /admin/pages/[id] load with full SEO Studio panel. Gemini AI SEO optimizer (/api/ai/seo-optimizer) operational with authenticated admin. Sitemap XML contains changefreq/priority, respects host/locale, excludes noindex pages. All 6 public routes return JSON-LD structured data. Contact Emailit validation working. Admin protection verified (307 redirect to login, 401 on API).
critical_code_review_comments: SEO Studio panel (SeoEditorPanel.tsx) provides comprehensive page-by-page SEO editing: metaTitle, canonical, robots, OG, Twitter, schemaOrgJson, imageRecommendations, sitemapPriority/changefreq
Gemini AI integration (/api/ai/seo-optimizer) is REAL - returns structured SEO suggestions including image alt recommendations
Sitemap generation correctly filters noindex pages via isIndexablePage() and includes changefreq/priority from page-level settings
Home page content hybrid layer (getHomePageContent) reads from CMS page '/' if published, falls back to home_sections table, then to HOME_PAGE_FALLBACK
All public routes include StructuredDataScript component injecting JSON-LD based on page SEO configuration
Contact form uses Emailit provider (REAL, not mocked) with proper validation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All admin and public UI tests passed

seed_data_creation: None - using existing CMS bootstrap data
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Studio fully validated on both new and edit page flows. Gemini AI SEO optimizer is REAL and returns structured optimization data. Sitemap includes changefreq/priority and filters noindex pages. All public routes have JSON-LD. No responsive overflow issues on mobile (390px).

features_tested.admin_pages_new_seo_studio: PASS - SEO panel with all fields visible, 'Optimiser via IA' button present
features_tested.admin_pages_edit_seo_studio: PASS - SEO Studio loads with populated data (Score 78%), all SEO fields editable
features_tested.api_ai_seo_optimizer_with_auth: PASS - Returns 200 with Gemini-generated optimization data
features_tested.sitemap_changefreq: PASS - All entries include valid changefreq (weekly/monthly)
features_tested.sitemap_priority: PASS - Homepage has priority 1.0, other pages 0.7
features_tested.sitemap_noindex_filtered: PASS - No admin/private pages in sitemap
features_tested.home_page_cms_hybrid: PASS - Home page loads correctly from CMS content
features_tested.responsive_no_overflow: PASS - No horizontal overflow on any public page (mobile 390px)

mocked_api.note: Both Emailit and Gemini integrations are REAL (not mocked)
